title: GitHub repository readiness and full logic integrity audit

found_errors.finding: manifests/live_core_manifest.json active_version remained stage83 and canonical_package pointed to the Stage83 ZIP, so the repository advertised Stage84 in README/package_manifest while the live core still selected Stage83.
found_errors.fix: Set active_version to stage84, canonical_package to Stage84 ZIP, added stage83_1/stage84 active gates and invariants.

found_errors.finding: src/v1700/gates/release_gate.py did not invoke Stage83.1 or Stage84 gates, so the main GitHub CI gate could pass without validating the new development layer.
found_errors.fix: Extended active-version routing to stage83.1/stage84 and added stage83_1_release_gate and stage84_release_gate to the returned gate report.

found_errors.finding: tools/run_stage72_repo_doctor.py only allowed stage72/stage72.1, while the test allowed only through stage83. This would fail scheduled/full CI after the manifest was corrected.
found_errors.fix: Updated repo doctor and its test to allow stage84 and assert presence of stage83_1/stage84 gates.

found_errors.finding: README claimed Stage84 at top but still carried a “Current Canonical Stage: Stage80” section.
found_errors.fix: Changed the section to Stage84 and clarified Stage80 as preserved hierarchy foundation.

verification.ci_core_equivalent: pass: pytest tests/unit tests/integration, runtime_smoke, run_release_gate
verification.secret_scan: no concrete secrets found; one documentation-only api-key option mention in GitNexus SKILL.md
verification.large_files: release evidence JSON files exceed 1MB but are acceptable if release evidence is intentionally versioned

github_readiness: repo-capable after patch; recommended next optional cleanup is reducing or moving generated release/current mega-reports if repository weight matters.
